languages.text: "Возиться с увечным — скучное занятие, не достойное Вольного Торговца. Разберитесь сами".

traits.locale_text: "Я, Лорд-капитан {name} фон Валанциус, приб{mf|ыл|ыла} для проверки здоровья. Немедленно проведите ее в надлежащем виде! "

languages.text: "Seeing to the needs of a maimed man is tedious work undeserving of the Rogue Trader's attention. Do your duty as you see fit."
languages.original_text: "Возиться с увечным — скучное занятие, не достойное Вольного Торговца. Разберитесь сами".

traits.locale_text: "Seeing to the needs of a maimed man is tedious work undeserving of the Rogue Trader's attention. Do your duty as you see fit."
"Seeing to the needs of a maimed man is tedious work undeserving of the Rogue Trader's attention. Do your duty as you see fit."

languages.text: 「ロードキャプテン、{name}・フォン・ヴァランシウスである。健康診断の受診に来た。直ちに、然るべき手順で執り行え！」
languages.original_text: "I, Lord Captain {name} von Valancius, am presenting myself for a health review. Conduct it immediately in the proper manner!"

traits.locale_text: ロードキャプテン、{name}・フォン・ヴァランシウスである。健康診断の受診に来た。直ちに、然るべき手順で執り行え！

languages.text: « Veiller aux besoins d'un homme mutilé est indigne de l'attention {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. Faites comme bon vous semble. »
languages.original_text: "Seeing to the needs of a maimed man is tedious work undeserving of the Rogue Trader's attention. Do your duty as you see fit."

traits.locale_text: « Veiller aux besoins d'un homme mutilé est indigne de l'attention {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. Faites comme bon vous semble. »

languages.text: "Sakat bir adamın ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak, Hür Tacir'in ilgisine layık olmayan sıkıcı bir iştir. Görevi nasıl uygun görürsen öyle yerine getir."
languages.original_text: "Seeing to the needs of a maimed man is tedious work undeserving of the Rogue Trader's attention. Do your duty as you see fit."

traits.locale_text: "Sakat bir adamın ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak, Hür Tacir'in ilgisine layık olmayan sıkıcı bir iştir. Görevi nasıl uygun görürsen öyle yerine getir."

languages.text: "Die Versorgung eines verstümmelten Mannes ist eine mühsame Arbeit, die der Aufmerksamkeit {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} nicht würdig ist. Tut Eure Pflicht wie Ihr es für richtig haltet."
languages.original_text: "Seeing to the needs of a maimed man is tedious work undeserving of the Rogue Trader's attention. Do your duty as you see fit."

traits.locale_text: "Die Versorgung eines verstümmelten Mannes ist eine mühsame Arbeit, die der Aufmerksamkeit {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} nicht würdig ist. Tut Eure Pflicht wie Ihr es für richtig haltet."

languages.text: «Atender a las necesidades de un mutilado es una labor indigna de la atención de un{mf||a} Comerciante Independiente. Hagan lo que estimen oportuno».
languages.original_text: "Seeing to the needs of a maimed man is tedious work undeserving of the Rogue Trader's attention. Do your duty as you see fit."

traits.locale_text: «Atender a las necesidades de un mutilado es una labor indigna de la atención de un{mf||a} Comerciante Independiente. Hagan lo que estimen oportuno».

languages.text: “照顾残废之人这类琐事，不值得行商浪人费心。照你的职责去办就是。”
languages.original_text: "Seeing to the needs of a maimed man is tedious work undeserving of the Rogue Trader's attention. Do your duty as you see fit."

traits.locale_text: “照顾残废之人这类琐事，不值得行商浪人费心。照你的职责去办就是。”
